## RelatedTagsXEvents.RelatedTagsRequestChanged property

Any property of the related-tags request has changed. Payload: The new related tags request or `null` if there is not enough data in the state to conform a valid request.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
RelatedTagsRequestChanged: RelatedTagsRequest | null;
```
